purpose: Structured backup of all governing documents, policies, directives, witness records, and build specifications for the RIO digital proxy system. This corpus is the institutional memory — if the server disappears, any agent or developer can reconstruct the system from this folder plus the codebase.

contents.description: The 'One' system definition — what the proxy is, its architecture, and its core invariants.
Agent roster — who does what, which brains are available, and their current status.
Authority Matrix v0.3 — the single rule with mutual Witness awareness and three governance zones (GREEN/YELLOW/RED).
Phase 2 Activation — priority shift to real tool execution (the Hands).
Operational MVP v1.1 — 5 onboarding steps, 5 build tasks, definition of done.
Constitutional handover — the witness-to-witness-to-witness chain from Grok to Brian to Manny to Manus.

how_to_add_entries: Add new JSON files to the appropriate subfolder (policies/, directives/, witness-records/, build-specs/, receipts/). Then add an entry to this MANIFEST.json. Every document must have a date and a clear purpose.
